brandDescription: Tata Motors is a leading Indian automotive manufacturer known for innovative design, safety, and engineering excellence. From the reimagined Sierra to the electric Tiago, Harrier, Curvv, and Nexon, Tata Motors continues to push boundaries with bold design, advanced technology, and superior comfort.

models.name: Sierra 1.5L Revotron Petrol MT
models.description: The all-new Tata Sierra is extraordinary. Reimagined for a new era. Sharper in design. Richer in detail. More iconic than ever. Escape Mediocre with the Sierra that combines bold design with advanced technology and superior comfort. Dimensions and fuel tank capacity - 50L.

models.name: Tiago EV 19.2 kWh
models.description: The next gen Tiago. Just — wow. The Tiago EV combines stunning looks with superlative features and proven safety. With a 19.2 kWh battery pack, it delivers impressive range and performance. Dimensions – 3,825 mm L x 1,654 mm W x 1,562 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,400 mm. Boot Space - 240 L.

models.name: Harrier EV 65 kWh RWD
models.description: The Harrier.ev is engineered to take on the impossible. It delivers instant torque, dynamic precision, and next-gen terrain adaptability, redefining what it means to go electric in an SUV. Dimensions – 4,607 mm L x 2,132 mm W x 1,740 mm H. Wheelbase - 2,741 mm. Boot Space - 502 L.
